source.title: World’s fastest sheep shearers to compete at Corwen Shears

en.summary: World's fastest sheep shearers will compete at the Corwen Shears event in Wales.
en.why_irrelevant: It is a niche rural sport unrelated to mainstream news or tech.

zh.summary: 全球最快的剪羊毛选手将在威尔士的科文剪羊毛大赛中竞技。
zh.why_irrelevant: 这是与主流新闻或科技无关的小众乡村运动。

brief: US tariffs on 80+ nations and Brent crude above $100 dominate news, while India's 'cockroach' protests continue; papers study AI transparency and usability in conversational systems.
news_summary: US imposed 10% tariffs on 60+ countries for forced labor, replacing expired global levy; India's activist Wangchuk ended hunger strike but protests persist; oil topped $100 amid Iran conflict.
papers_summary: Research on conversational product advisors highlights transparency issues in LLM-based systems; studies on augmented reality for Deaf students and wearable AI for creative writing advance inclusive design.

en.brief: US tariffs on 80+ nations and Brent crude above $100 dominate news, while India's 'cockroach' protests continue; papers study AI transparency and usability in conversational systems.
en.news_summary: US imposed 10% tariffs on 60+ countries for forced labor, replacing expired global levy; India's activist Wangchuk ended hunger strike but protests persist; oil topped $100 amid Iran conflict.

zh.brief: 今日焦點：美國以強迫勞動為由對60個貿易夥伴課徵新關稅，引發全球關注；同時白宮指控中國AI公司竊取技術，中美科技戰持續升溫。
zh.news_summary: 美國對60個貿易夥伴課徵10%-12.5%關稅，中國、台灣、歐盟等受影響；白宮指控中國月之暗面竊取Anthropic AI技術。
zh.papers_summary: 今日無相關論文，但英文論文探討AI在產品推薦、創意寫作、可視化等領域的可用性與倫理問題。

todays_image.caption: Just as the red algae Champia parvula clings and spreads in coastal waters, the new U.S. tariffs grip and ripple through global trade with a similar invasive intensity.
todays_image.title: Champia parvula (C. Agardh) Harv.
